title: Affirmative commands
objectives: Give commands to tú, usted, vosotros, ustedes
Recognize where the imperative borrows from the subjunctive

vocab.es: ven / pon / sal / haz / di / ten / ve / sé
vocab.ru: иди / положи / выйди / сделай / скажи / держи / иди / будь

grammar_notes: tú: same as 3rd person sing. present: habla, come, vive. Eight irregulars: ven (venir), pon (poner), sal (salir), haz (hacer), di (decir), ten (tener), ve (ir), sé (ser).
usted/ustedes: use the subjunctive forms (hable, coma, hablen, coman).
vosotros (Spain): replace -r of infinitive with -d. hablar→hablad, comer→comed, vivir→vivid.
nosotros 'let's ...' also uses subjunctive: hablemos, comamos, vamos.
